name: sextant-mcp
description: Sextant — code-quality grader for AI agents. Runs after edits, surfaces findings, and optionally blocks turn-end on a RequestChanges verdict.

plugins.name: sextant
plugins.description: Code-quality grader for AI agents. Runs Sextant after edits, surfaces findings to the agent so it self-corrects, and optionally blocks turn-end on a RequestChanges verdict.
